messages.text: The Cantor raises every limb at once and the whole cathedral answers, ten thousand throats loosing the Unison Hymn as a single wall of spore-thick sound that folds over you and tries to pull your voice out to join it. The blow {verb} you!
The Cantor cues the Unison Hymn and the choir's full voice rolls across the nave, and you drop behind a rank of fused bone as the sound shears the tier above you to dust.
The Cantor bends the whole Unison Hymn down onto you alone, and for a long, drowning moment your own throat opens against your will and begins, helplessly, to sing! The blow {verb} you!
